description.value: Aura strong conjuration [evil]; CL 15th; Slot none; Price 20,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This implant appears as a demonic eye, tongue, finger, ear, or nose floating in a small jar of transparent fluid. In order to gain the benefit of this implant, the contents of the jarâthick fluid, body part, and allâmust be consumed as a full-round action. This immediately grants a permanent +8 racial bonus on all Perception checks (note that as a racial bonus, this does not stack with any other racial bonuses a creature might already possess). After gaining this bonus, the part of the creatureâs body corresponding to the body part eaten changes to match the eaten partâeyes might become red, ears might grow long and pointed, a tongue might become forked, and so on. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, limited wish, regenerate; Cost 10,000 gp
